question: count orders for each customer
sql:
SELECT "c"."customerNumber", COUNT("o"."orderNumber") 
FROM "customers" "c" 
JOIN "orders" "o" ON "c"."customerNumber" = "o"."customerNumber" 
GROUP BY "c"."customerNumber"

question: Show total payments per customer
sql:
SELECT "c"."customerNumber", SUM("p"."amount") AS "total_payments" 
FROM "customers" "c" 
JOIN "payments" "p" ON "c"."customerNumber" = "p"."customerNumber" 
GROUP BY "c"."customerNumber"

question: Show total payments per customer
sql:
SELECT "c"."customerNumber", "c"."customerName", SUM("p"."amount") AS "total_payments" 
FROM "customers" "c" 
JOIN "payments" "p" ON "c"."customerNumber" = "p"."customerNumber" 
GROUP BY "c"."customerNumber", "c"."customerName"

result_preview.textDescription: Attention car enthusiasts: Make your wildest car ownership dreams come true. Whether you are looking for classic muscle cars, dream sports cars or movie-inspired miniatures, you will find great choices in this category. These replicas feature superb attention to detail and craftsmanship and offer features such as working steering system, opening forward compartment, opening rear trunk with removable spare wheel, 4-wheel independent spring suspension, and so on. The models range in size from 1:10 to 1:24 scale and include numerous limited edition and several out-of-production vehicles. All models include a certificate of authenticity from their manufacturers and come fully assembled and ready for display in the home or office.

Our motorcycles are state of the art replicas of classic as well as contemporary motorcycle legends such as Harley Davidson, Ducati and Vespa. Models contain stunning details such as official logos, rotating wheels, working kickstand, front suspension, gear-shift lever, footbrake lever, and drive chain. Materials used include diecast and plastic. The models range in size from 1:10 to 1:50 scale and include numerous limited edition and several out-of-production vehicles. All models come fully assembled and ready for display in the home or office. Most include a certificate of authenticity.

Unique, diecast airplane and helicopter replicas suitable for collections, as well as home, office or classroom decorations. Models contain stunning details such as official logos and insignias, rotating jet engines and propellers, retractable wheels, and so on. Most come fully assembled and with a certificate of authenticity from their manufacturers.

The perfect holiday or anniversary gift for executives, clients, friends, and family. These handcrafted model ships are unique, stunning works of art that will be treasured for generations! They come fully assembled and ready for display in the home or office. We guarantee the highest quality, and best value.

Model trains are a rewarding hobby for enthusiasts of all ages. Whether you are looking for collectible wooden trains, electric streetcars or locomotives, youwill find a number of great choices for any budget within this category. The interactive aspect of trains makes toy trains perfect for young children. The wooden train sets are ideal for children under the age of 5.

question: Get customer phone numbers
sql:
SELECT "offices"."phone" FROM "customers" 
JOIN "employees" ON "customers"."salesRepEmployeeNumber" = "employees"."employeeNumber" 
JOIN "offices" ON "employees"."officeCode" = "offices"."officeCode"

question: Total payments per customer
sql:
SELECT "c"."customerNumber", SUM("p"."amount") AS "total_payments" 
FROM "customers" "c" 
JOIN "payments" "p" ON "c"."customerNumber" = "p"."customerNumber" 
GROUP BY "c"."customerNumber"

question: Products per product line

decomposition.intent: Retrieve products grouped by product line

sql:
SELECT "productlines"."productLine", "products"."productName" 
FROM "products" 
JOIN "productlines" 
ON "products"."productLine" = "productlines"."productLine" 
ORDER BY "productlines"."productLine"

question: Employees per office

decomposition.intent: get the number of employees per office

sql:
SELECT "offices"."officeCode", COUNT("employees"."employeeNumber") 
FROM "employees" 
JOIN "offices" ON "employees"."officeCode" = "offices"."officeCode" 
GROUP BY "offices"."officeCode"

decomposition.intent: calculate total stock per product vendor

question: Average buy price per product line

decomposition.intent: calculate average buy price per product line

sql: SELECT AVG(p."buyPrice"), pl."productLine" FROM "products" p JOIN "productlines" pl ON p."productLine" = pl."productLine" GROUP BY pl."productLine"

question: Orders per customer

decomposition.intent: retrieve the number of orders for each customer

sql:
SELECT "orders"."orderNumber", "customers"."customerName" 
FROM "orders" 
JOIN "customers" ON "orders"."customerNumber" = "customers"."customerNumber" 
GROUP BY "orders"."orderNumber", "customers"."customerName" 
ORDER BY COUNT("orders"."orderNumber") DESC;

question: Max MSRP per product line

decomposition.intent: Find the maximum MSRP for each product line

sql:
SELECT "p"."productLine", MAX("p"."MSRP") 
FROM "products" "p" 
JOIN "productlines" "pl" ON "p"."productLine" = "pl"."productLine" 
GROUP BY "p"."productLine"

question: Get payments with customer country

decomposition.intent: Retrieve payments with customer country information

sql:
SELECT "p"."checkNumber", "p"."paymentDate", "p"."amount", "c"."country" 
FROM "payments" "p" 
JOIN "customers" "c" ON "p"."customerNumber" = "c"."customerNumber" 
JOIN "orders" "o" ON "p"."customerNumber" = "o"."customerNumber"

question: Total payments per customer
sql:

question: Products per product line

decomposition.intent: Retrieve products grouped by product line

sql: SELECT "productlines"."productLine", "products"."productName" FROM "products" JOIN "productlines" ON "products"."productLine" = "productlines"."productLine" GROUP BY "productlines"."productLine", "products"."productName"

question: Employees per office

decomposition.intent: get the number of employees per office

sql:
SELECT "offices"."officeCode", "offices"."city", "offices"."country", COUNT("employees"."employeeNumber") 
FROM "employees" 
JOIN "offices" ON "employees"."officeCode" = "offices"."officeCode" 
GROUP BY "offices"."officeCode", "offices"."city", "offices"."country"

question: Total stock per product vendor

decomposition.intent: calculate total stock per product vendor

sql: SELECT "p"."productVendor", SUM("p"."quantityInStock") AS "total_stock" FROM "products" "p" GROUP BY "p"."productVendor"

question: Average buy price per product line

decomposition.intent: calculate average buy price per product line

sql: SELECT AVG(p."buyPrice") , p."productLine" FROM "products" p JOIN "productlines" pl ON p."productLine" = pl."productLine" GROUP BY p."productLine"

question: Orders per customer
sql:
SELECT "orders"."orderNumber", "customers"."customerNumber", "customers"."customerName" 
FROM "orders" 
JOIN "customers" ON "orders"."customerNumber" = "customers"."customerNumber" 
GROUP BY "orders"."orderNumber", "customers"."customerNumber", "customers"."customerName" 
ORDER BY "customers"."customerNumber"

question: Max MSRP per product line

decomposition.intent: Find the maximum MSRP for each product line

sql:
SELECT "p"."productLine", MAX("p"."MSRP") 
FROM "products" "p" 
JOIN "productlines" "pl" ON "p"."productLine" = "pl"."productLine" 
GROUP BY "p"."productLine"

question: Show me the top 5 products by total revenue

decomposition.intent: get top 5 products by total revenue

sql:
SELECT "od"."productCode", "p"."productName", SUM("od"."quantityOrdered" * "od"."priceEach") AS "total_revenue"
FROM "orderdetails" "od"
JOIN "products" "p" ON "od"."productCode" = "p"."productCode"
GROUP BY "od"."productCode", "p"."productName"
ORDER BY "total_revenue" DESC
LIMIT 5
